summary: Completed comprehensive testing of SecureImage Forge Phase 5: Automatic Vulnerability Remediation. All 15 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend UI tests passed including Remediation Summary, Auto-Remediate All button, generated Dockerfile display, Copy/Download buttons, AUTO-FIXABLE badges, individual Fix This buttons, and expandable CVE rows.
critical_code_review_comments: Trivy scanning is MOCKED - returns simulated CVE data with real CVE IDs from the remediation database
Delta scan verification is MOCKED - simulates vulnerability reduction after remediation
Docker building and Cosign signing remain MOCKED as in previous phases
test_credentials: No authentication required for this app
seed_data_creation: Created test builds with TEST_ prefix during testing: TEST_vuln_analysis, TEST_auto_remediate, TEST_single_cve, TEST_unknown_cve, TEST_remediation_history
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 5 Vulnerability Remediation features fully tested and working. Backend endpoints tested: /api/remediation/cve-database, /api/remediation/stats, /api/builds/{id}/vulnerabilities/analysis, POST /api/builds/{id}/remediate, POST /api/builds/{id}/remediate/{cve_id}, /api/builds/{id}/remediation-history. Frontend tested: BuildDetail vulnerabilities tab with Remediation Summary, Auto-Remediate All button, remediation result banner with fixes count/CVEs fixed/verification status, generated Dockerfile with Copy/Download buttons, AUTO-FIXABLE/PATCH AVAILABLE/BREAKING badges, individual Fix This buttons, expandable CVE rows with description and fix commands.

features_tested.cve_database_endpoint: PASS - returns 15+ CVEs with fix info, sorted by severity
features_tested.remediation_stats_endpoint: PASS - returns statistics including total remediations, fixes applied, database size
features_tested.vulnerability_analysis_endpoint: PASS - returns analysis with fixable_count, manual_required_count, vulnerabilities_with_remediation
features_tested.auto_remediate_endpoint: PASS - generates remediated Dockerfile with applied fixes and delta scan
features_tested.single_cve_remediate_endpoint: PASS - generates fix for known CVEs, returns manual_required for unknown
features_tested.remediation_history_endpoint: PASS - returns audit trail with remediation records
features_tested.ui_remediation_summary: PASS - displays Total, Auto-Fixable, Patch Available, Manual Required counts
features_tested.ui_auto_remediate_all_button: PASS - shows count of fixable vulnerabilities, triggers remediation
features_tested.ui_remediation_result_banner: PASS - shows Fixes Applied, CVEs Fixed, Verification status
features_tested.ui_generated_dockerfile: PASS - displays remediated Dockerfile with security metadata and patches
features_tested.ui_copy_download_buttons: PASS - Copy and Download buttons for Dockerfile
features_tested.ui_auto_fixable_badges: PASS - green AUTO-FIXABLE badges on fixable CVEs
features_tested.ui_breaking_badges: PASS - red BREAKING badges for fixes with breaking changes
features_tested.ui_fix_this_buttons: PASS - individual Fix This buttons for single CVE remediation
features_tested.ui_expandable_cve_rows: PASS - CVE rows expand to show description, fixed version, fix command

mocked_services_note: Trivy scanning returns simulated CVE data with real CVE IDs. Delta scan verification is simulated. Docker building and Cosign signing remain MOCKED.
